igbo.review_your_mission_objectives_and_cre: Lelee ebumnuche ozi gị na nkesa ndị ọrụ
igbo.countdown_and_liftoff_from_kennedy_spa: Ịgụ azụ na mbupu site na Kennedy Space Center
igbo.reach_low_earth_orbit_and_prepare_for_: Ruo okirikiri Ụwa dị ala ma kwado maka Trans-Lunar Injection
igbo.explore_the_lunar_surface_and_collect_: Nyochaa elu ọnwa ma chịkọta ihe nlele
igbo.launch_from_the_moon_and_rendezvous_wi: Bupu site n'Ọnwa ma zute modul iwu
igbo.re_entry_splashdown: Ịbanye Ọzọ na Ịdaba na Mmiri
igbo.survive_re_entry_and_splash_down_in_th: Lanarị ịbanye ọzọ ma daba na Oké Osimiri Pacific
igbo.pilots_the_lunar_module_to_the_surface: Na-eduzi modul ọnwa gaa elu ma na-eduzi EVA
igbo.orbits_the_moon_alone_in_the_command_m: Na-agba Ọnwa gburugburu naanị ya na modul iwu ka CDR na LMP na-enyocha
igbo.assists_with_descent_and_eva_operates_: Na-enyere aka na mgbadata na EVA, na-arụ ngwa sayensị
igbo.this_ancient_rock_from_the_lunar_highl: Nkume ochie a sitere n'ugwu ọnwa dị afọ ijeri 4.4 — ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ dị ochie ka Ọnwa n'onwe ya. Ọ na-agwa anyị na Ọnwa nwere oké osimiri magma zuru ụwa ọnụ n'otu oge.
igbo.dark_volcanic_basalt_filled_the_moon_s: Basalt ugwu mgbawa gbara ọchịchịrị mejupụtara nnukwu efere mmetụta nke Ọnwa wee mepụta «oké osimiri» gbara ọchịchịrị (maria) a na-ahụ site n'Ụwa. Lava ndị a gbawara afọ ijeri 3-3.5 gara aga.
igbo.a_jumbled_mix_of_rock_fragments_welded: Ngwakọta na-agbagharị agbagharị nke iberibe nkume jikọtara ọnụ site na mmetụta meteorite. A na-akụ elu Ọnwa ihe karịrị afọ ijeri 4.
igbo.lunar_soil_is_ground_up_rock_from_bill: Ala ọnwa bụ nkume egwepịara site n'ọtụtụ ijeri afọ nke ụgbọ mbara igwe meteorite pụtara. Ọ nwere ọbụna obere kpọmkwem iko na akara nke ụmụ irighiri ifufe anyanwụ.
igbo.apollo_17_found_orange_soil_tiny_glass: Apollo 17 chọtara ala oroma — obere kpọmkwem iko sitere na mgbawa ugwu mgbawa ochie afọ ijeri 3.7 gara aga. Ọ bụ otu n'ime ihe ndị kacha akpali akpali Apollo chọtara!
igbo.kreep_stands_for_potassium_k_rare_eart: KREEP pụtara Potassium (K), Rare Earth Elements, na Phosphorus (P). Mineral ndị a chịkọtara na ihe fọdụrụnụ ikpeazụ nke oké osimiri magma ọnwa.
igbo.meteorite_impacts_melt_rock_into_glass: Mmetụta meteorite na-agbaze nkume ka ọ bụrụ iko, nke na-efe na mbara igwe ma daa dị ka obere kpọmkwem. Ụfọdụ nwere gas ndị ejidere site na ikuku ọnwa ochie.
igbo.apollo_15_found_this_4_1_billion_year_: Apollo 15 chọtara anorthosite a dị afọ ijeri 4.1, otu n'ime nkume ndị kacha ochie a chịkọtarala. O nyere aka gosipụta echiche oké osimiri magma gbasara mmepụta nke Ọnwa.
igbo.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh: Ọnwa dị ihe dị ka km 384,400 — ọkụ na-ewe sekọnd 1.3 iru ebe ahụ!
igbo.apollo_missions_took_about_3_days_each: Ozi Apollo were ihe dị ka ụbọchị 3 n'akụkụ ọ bụla, na-aga na ọsọ ~km 3,900/elekere.
igbo.the_moon_s_gravity_is_1_6_of_earth_s_a: Ndọda Ọnwa bụ 1/6 nke Ụwa. Onye dị kilogram 70 na-adị naanị ~kilogram 12 ebe ahụ!
igbo.the_sunlit_side_reaches_127_c_while_th: Akụkụ anwụ na-eru 127°C, ebe akụkụ gbara ọchịchịrị na-agbada ruo -173°C!
igbo.12_astronauts_walked_on_the_moon_acros: Ụmụ ọrụ mbara igwe 12 jere ije n'Ọnwa n'ofe Apollo 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, na 17.
igbo.buzz_aldrin_said_contact_light_first_b: Buzz Aldrin kwuru «Contact light» mbụ, mana ahịrị ama ama Armstrong malitere na «That's».
igbo.the_first_stage_burned_rp_1_kerosene_w: Usoro mbụ rere kerosin RP-1 na oxygen mmiri — ihe karịrị tọn 2,000 nke mmanụ ọkụ na nkeji 2.5!
igbo.sound_needs_a_medium_air_water_to_trav: Ụda chọrọ ụzọ (ikuku/mmiri) iji gaa njem. Ọnwa enweghị ikuku, yabụ ọ na-agbachi nkịtị kpamkpam.
igbo.every_apollo_astronaut_reported_that_m: Onye ọrụ mbara igwe Apollo ọ bụla kọrọ na uzuzu ọnwa na-esi ísì dị ka egbe ọkụ a kpọrọ ọkụ mgbe ha wetara ya n'ime LM!
igbo.the_oldest_moon_rocks_are_4_4_billion_: Nkume ọnwa ndị kacha ochie dị afọ ijeri 4.4 — ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ dị ochie ka Sistemụ Anyanwụ!
igbo.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh_2: Ọnwa dị ihe dị ka km 384,400 — ọkụ na-ewe sekọnd 1.3 iru ebe ahụ!
igbo.waste_management_malfunction: Adịghị Arụ Ọrụ nke Njikwa Mkpofu
igbo.rotate_spacecraft_to_expose_vent_to_su: Tụgharịa ụgbọ mbara igwe iji kpughee oghere ikuku na anwụ
igbo.reroute_cabin_heater_duct_to_warm_the_: Megharịa ụzọ ọkpọ ọkụ kabin iji mee ka ọkpọ ọkụ dị ọkụ
igbo.seal_the_vent_and_use_backup_waste_bag: Mechie oghere ikuku ma jiri akpa mkpofu nchekwa
igbo.trust_the_computer_and_continue_go: Tụkwasị obi na kọmpụta ma gaa n'ihu — «Gaa!»
igbo.abort_the_descent_fire_ascent_engine: Kagbuo mgbadata — gbanye engine nrigo ọkụ
igbo.switch_to_full_manual_control: Gbanwee na njikwa aka zuru ezu
igbo.take_manual_control_and_fly_past_the_b: Were njikwa aka ma fee gafee nkume ndị ahụ
igbo.abort_and_try_again_next_orbit: Kagbuo ma nwaa ọzọ n'okirikiri na-esote
igbo.immediately_isolate_tank_2_and_switch_: Kewapụ tankị 2 ozugbo ma gbanwee na tankị 1
igbo.vent_tank_2_to_relieve_pressure: Wepụ ikuku tankị 2 iji belata nrụgide
igbo.try_to_reset_the_tank_heater_circuit: Nwaa ịtọgharịa sekit ọkpọ ọkụ tankị
igbo.administer_anti_nausea_medication_and_: Nye ọgwụ mgbochi ọgbụgbọ na oge ezumike
igbo.tough_it_out_keep_working_through_the_: Tachie obi — nọgide na-arụ ọrụ n'agbanyeghị ọgbụgbọ
igbo.reduce_visual_stimulation_and_close_wi: Belata mkpali anya ma mechie ihe mkpuchi windo
igbo.guided_experience_auto_landing_extende: Ahụmịhe a na-eduzi — ọdịda akpaaka, O₂ agbatịrị agbatị
igbo.realistic_tight_fuel_budget_faster_o_d: Nke n'ezie — mmefu mmanụ ọkụ siri ike, oriri O₂ ngwa ngwa
igbo.complete_your_first_eva_moonwalk: Mezuo ije ọnwa EVA mbụ gị
igbo.complete_mission_on_commander_difficul: Mezuo ozi na ọkwa ihe isi ike Ọchịagha
igbo.full_mission_simulation_launch_to_spla: Nṅomi ozi zuru ezu • Mbupu ruo ịdaba na mmiri
igbo.begin_mission_proceed_to_launch: 🚀 Malite Ozi — Gaa n'ihu na Mbupu
igbo.animated_saturn_v_rocket_launch_sequen: Usoro mbupu rọketị Saturn V nwere mmegharị. Ịgụ azụ sekọnd 5 na-esote nrigo site na ikuku gaa okirikiri. Na-egosi ịdị elu, ọsọ, ike G, na nkewa usoro.
igbo.saturn_v_3_stages_7_5_million_lbs_thru: 🚀 Saturn V • Usoro 3 • Mkpali lbs nde 7.5
igbo.watch_the_countdown_and_ascent_through: Lelee ịgụ azụ na nrigo site na ikuku Ụwa
igbo.proceed_to_earth_orbit_phase_after_suc: Gaa n'ihu na usoro okirikiri Ụwa mgbe mbupu gara nke ọma
igbo.animated_view_of_spacecraft_in_low_ear: Nlele nwere mmegharị nke ụgbọ mbara igwe na okirikiri Ụwa dị ala na kilomita 185. CSM na-emezu okirikiri 1.5 ka windo mgbanye maka Trans-Lunar Injection na-akwado na ọnọdụ Ọnwa n'ọdịnihu. A na-egosi ihe ọgụgụ okirikiri, ịdị elu, ọsọ, na njikere TLI.
igbo.altitude_185_km_speed_28_000_km_h_1_5_: Ịdị elu: km 185 • Ọsọ: km 28,000/elekere • Okirikiri 1.5 tupu mgbanye TLI
igbo.the_s_ivb_third_stage_will_fire_for_5_: Usoro nke atọ S-IVB ga-agba ọkụ maka nkeji 5 sekọnd 47 iji mee ka ọsọ baa site na km 28,000/elekere ruo km 38,900/elekere — ọsọ mgbapụ. Otu mgbanye a na-ezipu gị n'ụzọ gaa Ọnwa nke dị km 384,400.
igbo.execute_trans_lunar_injection_burn_to_: Mee mgbanye Trans-Lunar Injection iji malite njem ụbọchị 3 gaa Ọnwa
igbo.animated_trans_lunar_coast_earth_shrin: Njem Trans-Lunar nwere mmegharị. Ụwa na-apụ n'aka ekpe ka Ọnwa na-eto n'aka nri ka ụgbọ na-aga kilomita 384,400 n'ụbọchị 3. Na-egosi ihe ọgụgụ anya na mkparịta ụka ozi.
igbo.arrive_at_the_moon_and_enter_lunar_orb: Rute Ọnwa ma banye okirikiri ọnwa na ịdị elu kilomita 110
igbo.animated_view_of_spacecraft_orbiting_t: Nlele nwere mmegharị nke ụgbọ mbara igwe na-agba Ọnwa gburugburu na ịdị elu kilomita 110. Na-egosi elu ọnwa nwere olulu, ebe ọdịda Oké Osimiri Udo akara akara akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ, na ntụpọ ụgbọ mbara igwe na-agbagharị.
igbo.undock_lunar_module_eagle_from_command: Wepụ modul ọnwa Eagle site na modul iwu Columbia ma malite mgbadata ike gaa elu ọnwa
igbo.start_slowing_down_early_moon_gravity_: Malite ibelata ọsọ n'oge — ndọda Ọnwa dị nro mana enweghị obi ebere
igbo.watch_your_fuel_gauge_you_can_t_thrust: Lelee igwe nha mmanụ ọkụ gị — ị gaghị enwe ike ịkwagharị na-enweghị mmanụ ọkụ!
igbo.reduce_horizontal_speed_before_focusin: Belata ọsọ kwụ ọtọ tupu ilekwasị anya na nke kwụ ọtọ
igbo.the_real_apollo_11_landed_with_only_25: Apollo 11 n'ezie rịdara na naanị sekọnd 25 nke mmanụ ọkụ fọdụrụ!
igbo.interactive_lunar_descent_piloting_gam: Egwuregwu nduzi mgbadata ọnwa na-emekọrịta. Jiri W ma ọ bụ akụ elu maka mkpali, A na D ma ọ bụ akụ ekpe na nri maka mmegharị akụkụ. Daa na ọsọ kwụ ọtọ nke pere mita 3 kwa sekọnd na ọsọ kwụ otu nke pere mita 5 kwa sekọnd.
igbo.begin_extravehicular_activity_moonwalk: Malite ọrụ mpụga ụgbọ (ije ọnwa) iji nyochaa elu ọnwa ma chịkọta ihe nlele geology
igbo.collect_at_least_4_unique_rock_samples: Chịkọta opekata mpe ihe nlele nkume 4 pụrụ iche iji mezuo ebumnuche geology.
igbo.apollo_11_brought_back_47_5_lb_of_luna: Apollo 11 wetaghachiri lb 47.5 nke ihe nlele ọnwa; Apollo 17 wetara lb 243.
igbo.in_one_sixth_gravity_a_hop_covers_abou: Na ndọda otu ụzọ n'ime isii, otu mwụli na-ekpuchi ihe dị ka ugboro isii nke anya kwụ otu maka otu mbọ.
igbo.earth_hangs_in_a_fixed_spot_in_the_lun: Ụwa na-akwụba n'otu ebe edozi na mbara igwe ọnwa n'ihi na Ọnwa nọ na ntụgharị nke kwekọrọ (mkpọchi site na mmiri mmiri).
igbo.webgl_failed_to_initialize_your_browse: WebGL emepeghị. Ihe nchọgharị gị ma ọ bụ ngwaọrụ gị nwere ike ọ gaghị akwado mmụba ngwaike 3D.
igbo.interactive_3d_lunar_surface_eva_use_w: EVA 3D na-emekọrịta n'elu ọnwa. Jiri WASD jee ije, Space wụlie na ndọda otu ụzọ n'ime isii, F chịkọta ihe nlele nkume, na òké lee gburugburu. Chịkọta ihe nlele geology ma nyochaa elu Ọnwa n'akụkụ modul ọnwa.
igbo.the_apollo_lunar_surface_experiments_p: Apollo Lunar Surface Experiments Package (ALSEP) rụrụ ọrụ kemgbe afọ ndị ọrụ mbara igwe gachara. Igwe seismometer chọpụtara ala ọma jijiji ọnwa na mmetụta meteorite ruo 1977.
igbo.the_lunar_roving_vehicle_cost_38_milli: Lunar Roving Vehicle fọrọ nde dollar 38. Ụgbọ Apollo 17 jere km 35.7 — ka dọrọ na Ọnwa na mkpịsị!
igbo.the_flags_on_the_moon_have_been_bleach: Ọkọlọtọ ndị dị n'Ọnwa agbanweela ka ọ bụrụ ọcha dị ọcha site n'ọtụtụ iri afọ nke radieshọn UV na-anaghị enyochaghị. Naanị ọkọlọtọ Apollo 12 ka anwụrụ engine kpọrọ.
igbo.lunar_seismometers_detected_deep_moonq: Seismometer ọnwa chọpụtara ala ọma jijiji ọnwa miri emi nke ike mmiri mmiri Ụwa kpatara na omimi km 700-1100. Ọnwa ka nwere isi gbazere akụkụ!
igbo.scientists_bounce_lasers_off_this_mirr: Ndị sayensị na-eme ka laser site na enyo a iji tụọ anya Ụwa-Ọnwa na nkenke cm 1. Ọnwa na-akwaga cm 3.8 site n'Ụwa kwa afọ.
igbo.explore_collect_samples_jump_in_1_6_gr: Nyochaa • Chịkọta ihe nlele • Wụlie na ndọda 1/6!
igbo.animated_lunar_ascent_sequence_ascent_: Usoro nrigo ọnwa nwere mmegharị. Usoro nrigo na-ebupu site n'Ọnwa na-ahapụ usoro mgbadata n'azụ, na-arịgo okirikiri ọnwa karịa kilomita 60, wee mee nzukọ-njikọ na modul iwu Columbia na-agbagharị. HUD na-egosi ịdị elu, usoro, na anya gaa CSM.
igbo.ascent_stage_launches_from_moon_docks_: Usoro nrigo na-ebupu site n'Ọnwa wee jikọọ na Columbia
igbo.the_lm_s_ascent_engine_a_single_start_: Engine nrigo nke LM — moto hypergolic mmalite otu na-enweghị nhọrọ kagbuo — na-agba ọkụ iji bupu gị site n'elu ọnwa. Usoro mgbadata na-arụ ọrụ dị ka ebe mbupu wee nọrọ n'azụ. Ị na-ezute ma jikọọ na Columbia, wee tụfuo «Eagle» (nke n'ikpeazụ na-ada n'Ọnwa).
igbo.fire_trans_earth_injection_burn_to_beg: Gbanye mgbanye Trans-Earth Injection iji malite njem ụbọchị 3 nlọghachi ụlọ
igbo.the_service_module_engine_fires_for_th: Engine modul ọrụ na-agba ọkụ maka Trans-Earth Injection. Ị na-ese n'elu mmiri gaa Ụwa ụbọchị 3, na-atụfu modul ọrụ, ma kwado modul iwu maka ịbanye ọzọ — usoro kacha dị ize ndụ nke ozi.
igbo.begin_atmospheric_re_entry_sequence_at: Malite usoro ịbanye ikuku ọzọ na kilomita 39,900 kwa elekere
igbo.animated_re_entry_sequence_command_mod: Usoro ịbanye ọzọ nwere mmegharị. Modul iwu na-abanye ikuku na km 39,900/elekere na okpomọkụ plasma ruo digirii 2,760. Na-egosi mgbanyụ redio, obere parachute, isi parachute, na ịdaba na mmiri oké osimiri.
igbo.watch_the_command_module_survive_re_en: Lelee modul iwu ka ọ na-alanarị ịbanye ọzọ site na plasma 2,760°C na km 39,900/elekere, na-emepe parachute, ma na-ada na Oké Osimiri Pacific.
igbo.complete_the_mission_with_pacific_ocea: Mezuo ozi site na ịdaba na mmiri Oké Osimiri Pacific. Nnọọ n'ụlọ, Ọchịagha!
igbo.welcome_home_commander_the_world_celeb: Nnọọ n'ụlọ, Ọchịagha. Ụwa na-eme mmemme.
igbo.these_samples_will_be_studied_by_scien: Ndị sayensị ga-amụ ihe nlele ndị a ọtụtụ iri afọ na-abịa.
igbo.reset_and_start_a_new_moon_mission_fro: Tọgharịa ma malite ozi ọnwa ọhụrụ site na mmalite
igbo.tsiolkovsky_rocket_equation_adjust_mas: Akụkụ rọketị Tsiolkovsky. Dozie oke ibu, oge ọkụ, na mkpali pụrụ iche (Isp). Nsonaazụ dị iche nke ọnọdụ 3 na-egosi ma delta-V gị ezughị, na-eru LEO, ma ọ bụ na-agbapụ Ụwa. Enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe.
igbo.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Echiche (ederede efu — enweghị azịza ziri ezi): Kedu lever kacha mkpa?
igbo.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Jide slaida abụọ kwụsie ike. Megharịa otu. Lelee.
igbo.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_o: Chọta ntọala abụọ na-emepụta otu nsonaazụ.
igbo.which_slider_affects_v_the_most_use_th: Kedu slaida na-emetụta Δv kacha? Jiri ndekọ.
igbo.real_spacecraft_trade_fuel_mass_agains: Ụgbọ mbara igwe n'ezie na-azụ ahịa oke ibu mmanụ ọkụ megide Isp. Nyochaa ihe kpatara ya.
igbo.i_think_i_understand_the_trade_offs: Echere m na aghọtara m mgbanwe ahụ
igbo.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_mass_: Kọwaa n'okwu nke gị: kedu ka oke ibu, oge ọkụ, na Isp si emekọrịta?
igbo.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Ndetu imewe: nsonaazụ dị iche nke ọnọdụ 3; enweghị akara; enweghị nkpughe — na nzube.
